scope: Human Review evidence package for the Class 1 Caster Family (Mage, Summoner, Acolyte) Runtime Integration in PR #88. Evidence capture and review preparation only -- does not record any approval decision, does not modify Runtime behavior, does not touch approved PNG/GIF binaries, does not touch gameplay/balance/Combat/Skill-Cast/projectile/VFX/Board-Preview.

sourceVerifiedBeforeCapture.packageIntegrity: 134/134 imported files unchanged; 3/3 Neutral Master hashes re-confirmed

captureMethod.renderPath: real production functions -- updateUnit()/updateCasterAnim() via hook.stepUnitRef(), rendered via hook.renderFrame() -- driven by a test-side setInterval ticker at a fixed 33ms real-wall-clock cadence with dt scaled by speedMul exactly like the production animate() loop (`dt *= speedMul`), so timing fidelity matches actual gameplay at both x1 and x4
captureMethod.whyNotThePhaseGatedLoop: The production animate() loop only calls updateUnit() when phase==='battle', and immediately fires the real onWaveCleared() victory dialog whenever no enemy units exist in the live `units` array -- which would have covered the board mid-capture for pure Idle/Move segments with no enemy present. The test-side ticker calls the identical updateUnit()/updateCasterAnim() functions directly, bypassing only the phase-gate wrapper, not any animation logic.
captureMethod.renderer: the real THREE.js renderer.render(scene, camera) call (exposed via hook.renderFrame()) -- not a synthetic canvas or mock
captureMethod.browserEngine: actual headless Chromium (Playwright) against the real autochess.html/src/game.js over a local static file server
captureMethod.manaIsolationNote: u.max_mana set to Infinity on Basic Attack test units only, to keep the pre-existing Skill/Cast system (out of scope) from hijacking the animState='attack' value mid-capture -- same isolation used for PR #88's own automated attack-cadence assertions

captureScenarios.note: Each character's x1/x4 video is a single continuous clip covering Idle(>=2 loops) -> Move right -> Move left (direction change/facing flip) -> return to Idle -> isolated Basic Attack -> return to Idle -> repeated Basic Attack (>=5) -> return to Idle, on-screen-labeled per phase.

runtimeExecutionFindings.characterIsolationDuringCapture: confirmed -- each character clip used only its own casterCls; batch clip's post-disposal readback shows each remaining unit's own distinct heroKey/animation state
runtimeExecutionFindings.repeatedAttackBehavior: full replay observed consistently at both x1 and x4 -- no stuck Attack state, no unbounded queue, clean return to Idle after the target was removed in every clip

lifecycleDisposalResult.x1: 3 remaining units (summoner/acolyte/mage) all retained hasMap=true and an active seqKey after disposing unit #1 -- no shared-texture corruption
lifecycleDisposalResult.x4: same result at x4 -- 3 remaining units all retained hasMap=true and an active seqKey

boardPreviewStatus: DEFERRED_UNTIL_AFTER_DEMO -- unchanged, not created or replaced by this task
boardUiCameraColorGrading: not reviewed or altered by this task -- this evidence package covers Caster Runtime motion behavior only
knownLimitations: This evidence package does not exercise the real production wave/AI-pathing system (stepToward/A*) -- Move segments were driven via directly-scripted moveFrom/moveTo waypoints through the same real moveT/lerp mechanism, to keep the capture deterministic and avoid the wave-cleared victory dialog contaminating Idle/Move footage. Basic Attack used a fixed in-range dummy target for the same reason. Both use the exact real per-frame update/render functions.
Equipment-derived attack-speed scenarios were not captured (matches the known limitation already recorded in PR #88's own Runtime Integration record).
Board/UI/camera/color-grading visual polish is explicitly out of scope and not reviewed here.
ATTACK_SPEED_RUNTIME_VALIDATION_PENDING and PENDING_SEPARATE_RUNTIME_INTEGRATION_VALIDATION remain unresolved -- unchanged by this evidence-only task.
nextStep: User's Human Visual Review decision on the evidence in this package. Not performed by this record: approval recording, canonical promotion, Melee integration, Skill/Cast, merge.
